verses.1: Inna arsalna noohan ila qawmihi an anthir qawmaka min qabli an yatiyahum AAathabun aleemun
verses.2: Qala ya qawmi innee lakum natheerun mubeenun
verses.4: Yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayuakhkhirkum ila ajalin musamman inna ajala Allahi itha jaa la yuakhkharu law kuntum taAAlamoona
verses.5: Qala rabbi innee daAAawtu qawmee laylan wanaharan
verses.7: Wainnee kullama daAAawtuhum litaghfira lahum jaAAaloo asabiAAahum fee athanihim waistaghshaw thiyabahum waasarroo waistakbaroo istikbaran
verses.9: Thumma innee aAAlantu lahum waasrartu lahum israran
verses.10: Faqultu istaghfiroo rabbakum innahu kana ghaffaran
verses.12: Wayumdidkum biamwalin wabaneena wayajAAal lakum jannatin wayajAAal lakum anharan
verses.13: Ma lakum la tarjoona lillahi waqaran
verses.15: Alam taraw kayfa khalaqa Allahu sabAAa samawatin tibaqan
verses.16: WajaAAala alqamara feehinna nooran wajaAAala alshshamsa sirajan
verses.21: Qala noohun rabbi innahum AAasawnee waittabaAAoo man lam yazidhu maluhu wawaladuhu illa khasaran
verses.23: Waqaloo la tatharunna alihatakum wala tatharunna waddan wala suwaAAan wala yaghootha wayaAAooqa wanasran
verses.24: Waqad adalloo katheeran wala tazidi alththalimeena illa dalalan
verses.25: Mimma khateeatihim oghriqoo faodkhiloo naran falam yajidoo lahum min dooni Allahi ansaran
verses.26: Waqala noohun rabbi la tathar AAala alardi mina alkafireena dayyaran
verses.27: Innaka in tatharhum yudilloo AAibadaka wala yalidoo illa fajiran kaffaran
verses.28: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayya waliman dakhala baytiya muminan walilmumineena waalmuminati wala tazidi alththalimeena illa tabaran
